Headline: #77 Belmont |Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Lakeshore/Diversey
ShortDescription: Eastbound  77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine Temporary Reroute at Wallace/35th
ShortDescription: #44 Wallace/Racine buses are temp. rerouted in both directions due to construction near Wallace/35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#44 Wallace/Racine buses temp. rerouted near Wallace/35th.

Northbound buses will operate via Wallace, 35th, Halsted, 31st and Wallace including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via Wallace, 31st, Halsted, 35th and Wallace.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Wallace/35th.

Headline: #3 King Drive, #146 Inner Lake Shore/Michigan Express, #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express, #151 Sheridan Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Michigan
ShortDescription: 3 King Drive, 146 Inner Lake Shore/Michigan Express, 147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express, 151 Sheridan buses rerouted near Chicago/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#3 King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Chicago/ Michigan due to street blockage near Chicago/Michigan.

  • Northbound buses will operate via Michigan, Ohio and Fairbanks, over normal route.
  • Southbound buses will operate via Fairbanks, Ontario and Michigan, over normal route.

#146 Inner Lake Shore/Michigan Express, #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express , #151 Sheridan  buses temp. rerouted due to street blockage near Chicago/Michigan.

  • Northbound buses will operate via Michigan, Ontario, State, Chicago and Michigan, over normal route. 
  • Southbound buses will operate via Michigan, Chicago, State, Ohio and Michigan, over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Michigan.
ShortDescription: #66 Chicago buses temp. rerouted in both directions due to construction near Chicago/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#66 Chicago buses temporarily rerouted in both directions

Eastbound buses will operate via Chicago, Wabash, Pearson, Mies Van Der Roe Way and Chicago, then resume their normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via Chicago, Mies Van Der Roe Way, Chestnut, Wabash and Chicago, then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted are rerouted due to construction near Chicago/Michigan.

Headline: Green and Pink Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Green and Pink Line trains are running with delays at Ashland/Lake due to signal problems.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green and Pink Line trains are running with delays at Ashland/Lake due to signal problems.

Shuttle buses have been requested from to provide connecting service in both directions for:

Green Line Riders -Harlem/Lake to Clark/Lake
Pink Link Riders - Polk to Clark/Lake

Pink Line Riders - trains will reroute to Blue Line tracks at Racine and continue westbound to 54th/Cermak.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include: 

#9 Ashland
#21 Cermak
#49 Western
#50 Damen
#52 Kedzie/California
#53 Pulaski
#54 Cicero

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
